this should be part of the refactoring #4872

comments.author: ZhengWG
comments.body: @amy-why-3459 Test with： ```bash vllm bench serve --omni --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8090 \ --backend openai-chat-omni --endpoint /v1/chat/completions \ --model /home/admin/model \ --dataset-name seed-tts \ --dataset-path /vllm-workspace/vllm-omni/scripts/seedtts_testset \ --seed-tts-locale en \ --num-prompts 64 --max-concurrency $1 --disable-shuffle \ --percentile-metrics "ttft,e2el,audio_rtf,audio_ttfp" ```

comments.author: ZhengWG
comments.body: Closing — not reproducible. Per-hop chunk accounting shows no chunks are dropped under load; the original gap was likely stale environment state plus talker length variance (talker runs at YAML temp=0.9, not the request's temperature=0). Thanks @amy-why-3459  for helping dig into this! cc @hsliuustc0106

title: [Bug]:  Streaming thinker-to-talker coalesced decode chunks are dropped, truncating audio under load
